file_impact.reason: Register and route the prerequisite-only criterion.
Run stable focused Pass-1 and Pass-2 prerequisite bins with authoritative record context.
Define and register prerequisite coverage and prerequisite verification contracts.
Budget focused prompt topologies and implement split and model escalation.
Validate and aggregate prerequisite coverage and focused verification results.
Force top-level INDETERMINATE when prerequisite coverage is indeterminate.
Wire focused coverage and verification through both workflow branches.
Add optional prerequisite attribution fields and a separate fidelity report while preserving container scoring.
Add the separate opt-in packed-versus-singleton prerequisite gold corpus.
Define isolated independent prerequisite consistency instructions.
Verify each finding against its authoritative subject-prerequisite pair.
Accept prerequisite coverage and focused verification arrays.
Carry final prerequisite coverage into verdict assembly.
Cover both contracts, coverage completeness, attribution veto, and indeterminate aggregation.
Cover wiring in both verifier branches and unsigned INDETERMINATE results.
Prove one preload and absence of prerequisite material from general prompts.
Cover focused prerequisite review and certification prevention.
